{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Receptionist",
  "description": "Onyx Beauty Hub is a luxury hair brand that offer wholesale and retail of virgin hair and raw single donor hairs . We offer variety of hair textures, including straight, wavy and curly hairs. Our hairs are carefully sourced and selected from various donors in China,Vietnam,Laos, Cambodia, Philippines, India,Burma,Argentina

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Receptionist

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Your Role


	You will serve as the first point of contact for all clients&mdash;responsible for managing the front desk, coordinating client flow, and ensuring every walk-in experience reflects our premium brand standard.


Key Responsibilties


	Welcome and attend to walk-in clients in a warm, professional, and courteous manner
	Ensure the reception area is clean, organized, and visually appealing at all times
	Provide accurate information about products, services, and in-store processes
	Actively manage the client waiting experience, ensuring no client is left unattended
	Escalate client concerns promptly and professionally
	Maintain visitor logs and proper sign-in procedures
	Handle calls, WhatsApp, and inquiries with clarity and professionalism
	Support the sales team by coordinating client flow and engagement.


Display &amp; Store Readiness (VERY IMPORTANT):


	Ensure all hair display units (slabs/display areas) are properly arranged and presentable every morning before opening
	Regularly inspect displayed wigs to ensure they remain neat, styled, and client-ready
	Communicate promptly with the Production/Styling Team for touch-up styling or maintenance of any worn or displaced wigs
	Maintain a luxury visual standard across the front desk and display area at all times.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / HND / B.Sc Degree
	2 - 3 years of experience in Reception, Customer Service, or Retail
	Experience in beauty, fashion, or luxury service environment is an advantage
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Well-groomed, confident, and presentable
	Ability to stay organized and composed in a fast-paced environment.


What We Are Looking For:


	Someone who naturally communicates with confidence and warmth
	Strong sense of attention to detail and customer satisfaction
	Ability to manage people, pressure, and presentation simultaneously
	A candidate who understands that every interaction influences a sale.


Compensation


	Competitive salary&nbsp;- N120,000 - N140,000 monthly.
	Performance-based incentives
	Opportunity to grow within a structured, fast-growing brand.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Application to:&nbsp;hronyxhairbynelly@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Front Desk Receptionist Application &ndash; Onyx Beauty Hub&quot; as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-22",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-11",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Onyx Beauty Hub"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "197832"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 75000,
      "maxValue": 150000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Receptionist Job at Onyx Beauty Hub




        
    

        
        Onyx Beauty Hub is a luxury hair brand that offer wholesale and retail of virgin hair and raw single donor hairs . We offer variety of hair textures, including straight, wavy and curly hairs. Our hairs are carefully sourced and selected from various donors in China,Vietnam,Laos, Cambodia, Philippines, India,Burma,Argentina

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Your Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	You will serve as the first point of contact for all clients—responsible for managing the front desk, coordinating client flow, and ensuring every walk-in experience reflects our premium brand standard.


Key Responsibilties


	Welcome and attend to walk-in clients in a warm, professional, and courteous manner
	Ensure the reception area is clean, organized, and visually appealing at all times
	Provide accurate information about products, services, and in-store processes
	Actively manage the client waiting experience, ensuring no client is left unattended
	Escalate client concerns promptly and professionally
	Maintain visitor logs and proper sign-in procedures
	Handle calls, WhatsApp, and inquiries with clarity and professionalism
	Support the sales team by coordinating client flow and engagement.


Display & Store Readiness (VERY IMPORTANT):


	Ensure all hair display units (slabs/display areas) are properly arranged and presentable every morning before opening
	Regularly inspect displayed wigs to ensure they remain neat, styled, and client-ready
	Communicate promptly with the Production/Styling Team for touch-up styling or maintenance of any worn or displaced wigs
	Maintain a luxury visual standard across the front desk and display area at all times.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / HND / B.Sc Degree
	2 - 3 years of experience in Reception, Customer Service, or Retail
	Experience in beauty, fashion, or luxury service environment is an advantage
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Well-groomed, confident, and presentable
	Ability to stay organized and composed in a fast-paced environment.


What We Are Looking For:


	Someone who naturally communicates with confidence and warmth
	Strong sense of attention to detail and customer satisfaction
	Ability to manage people, pressure, and presentation simultaneously
	A candidate who understands that every interaction influences a sale.


Compensation


	Competitive salary - N120,000 - N140,000 monthly.
	Performance-based incentives
	Opportunity to grow within a structured, fast-growing brand.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Application to: [email protected] using "Front Desk Receptionist Application – Onyx Beauty Hub" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Manager",
  "description": "Goldplates Feast House -&nbsp;We are a dynamic and rapidly growing Quick Service Restaurant (QSR) brand committed to excellence in food quality, customer satisfaction, and operational standards.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Chevron drive, Lagos&nbsp;(Hybrid)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a creative, proactive, and reliable Social Media Manager to handle the digital presence of our lounge. The ideal candidate will be responsible for creating engaging content, managing social media platforms, and capturing the vibrant nightlife experience of the lounge.
	This role is best suited for someone who is comfortable working at night, thrives in social environments, and understands current social media trends.


Responsibilities&nbsp;


	Create, plan, and publish engaging content across all social media platforms (Instagram, TikTok, etc.)
	Capture high-quality photos and videos during lounge operations (especially at night)
	Provide real-time content coverage during peak hours and events
	Develop creative content ideas that align with the lounge&rsquo;s brand and audience
	Manage daily social media activities including posting, comments, and messages
	Monitor trends and incorporate them into content strategy
	Collaborate with management on promotions, campaigns, and upcoming events
	Provide coverage and content for all lounge-hosted events
	Maintain a consistent brand voice and visual identity


&nbsp;Requirements


	Must own a smartphone or camera capable of shooting high-quality photos and videos
	Must be available to work primarily during night hours
	Must be available to attend and cover lounge events
	Must reside on or around Lagos Island
	Strong understanding of social media platforms and trends
	Basic video editing and content creation skills
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines


Preferred Qualifications:


	Previous experience managing social media for a lounge, club, or hospitality brand
	Experience with content editing tools (CapCut, InShot, Adobe, etc.)
	Creative mindset with attention to detail
	Familiarity with nightlife culture and audience engagement


Key Attributes:


	Energetic and socially aware
	Reliable and consistent
	Creative and trend-driven
	Able to work in a fast-paced environment.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hirehiverecruits@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Social Media Manager Job at Goldplates Feast House




        
    

        
        Goldplates Feast House - We are a dynamic and rapidly growing Quick Service Restaurant (QSR) brand committed to excellence in food quality, customer satisfaction, and operational standards.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Chevron drive, Lagos (Hybrid)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a creative, proactive, and reliable Social Media Manager to handle the digital presence of our lounge. The ideal candidate will be responsible for creating engaging content, managing social media platforms, and capturing the vibrant nightlife experience of the lounge.
	This role is best suited for someone who is comfortable working at night, thrives in social environments, and understands current social media trends.


Responsibilities 


	Create, plan, and publish engaging content across all social media platforms (Instagram, TikTok, etc.)
	Capture high-quality photos and videos during lounge operations (especially at night)
	Provide real-time content coverage during peak hours and events
	Develop creative content ideas that align with the lounge’s brand and audience
	Manage daily social media activities including posting, comments, and messages
	Monitor trends and incorporate them into content strategy
	Collaborate with management on promotions, campaigns, and upcoming events
	Provide coverage and content for all lounge-hosted events
	Maintain a consistent brand voice and visual identity


 Requirements


	Must own a smartphone or camera capable of shooting high-quality photos and videos
	Must be available to work primarily during night hours
	Must be available to attend and cover lounge events
	Must reside on or around Lagos Island
	Strong understanding of social media platforms and trends
	Basic video editing and content creation skills
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines


Preferred Qualifications:


	Previous experience managing social media for a lounge, club, or hospitality brand
	Experience with content editing tools (CapCut, InShot, Adobe, etc.)
	Creative mindset with attention to detail
	Familiarity with nightlife culture and audience engagement


Key Attributes:


	Energetic and socially aware
	Reliable and consistent
	Creative and trend-driven
	Able to work in a fast-paced environment.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

HR Manager (Supermarket / Retail) Job at Alister Greene Consulting




        
    

        
        Alister Greene Consulting is a professional consulting firm with expertise in providing a People - Process Management solution to small and medium Scale Enterprises. We work with organizations to overcome their organization specific people and process challenges; designing and implementing the most effective and efficient interventions for smooth transitioning from entrepreneurship to a professionally managed firm.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Manager (Supermarket / Retail)

Job Location: Ojo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a competent and hands-on HR Manager with experience in the supermarket or retail sector to oversee daily HR operations.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing workforce activities, ensuring compliance with Nigerian labor laws, and supporting business growth through effective people management.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage end-to-end recruitment, onboarding, and staff exit processes.
	Handle employee relations issues, including grievances and disciplinary actions.
	Ensure compliance with Nigerian Labor Law and company policies.
	Oversee staff attendance, shifts, and workforce planning (especially for store operations).
	Manage performance appraisal processes and staff development initiatives.
	Maintain accurate employee records and HR documentation.
	Coordinate payroll inputs (leave, overtime, deductions, etc.).
	Drive employee engagement and retention strategies.
	Provide HR support to store managers and operational teams.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field.
	3–5 years of HR experience, preferably in a supermarket, retail, or FMCG environment.
	Good knowledge of Nigerian Labor Law and HR best practices.
	Strong interpersonal and conflict resolution skills.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced, operations-driven environment.
	High level of integrity and confidentiality.


Salary
N350,000 – N400,000 (Gross Monthly).    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Technical Supervisor (Service Technician)",
  "description": "Honda Manufacturing (Nig.) Limited (&quot;HMN&quot;), founded in 1979, is a leading participant in Nigeria&#39;s power products sector and a division of Honda Motor Co., Japan. HMN manufactures and distributes a wide range of motorbikes, portable generators, water pumps, and general-purpose engines from its cutting-edge production facility at KM 6 on the Ota-Idiroko Road in Ota, Ogun State.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Technical Supervisor (Service Technician)

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	We are seeking a knowledgeable and experienced Technician with high capability to deliver high-quality training programs for motorcycle and power product repairs.
	The ideal candidate should possess practical experience in these fields and the ability to effectively teach and mentor others.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and deliver training programs on motorcycle and power product repair.
	Create and maintain training materials, including manuals, presentations, and practical exercises.
	Assess the effectiveness of training programs and make improvements as needed.
	Provide hands-on training and demonstrations to individuals and groups.
	Stay up-to-date with industry trends and technological advancements to ensure training content is current.
	Support trainees with ongoing mentorship and guidance.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Engineering or a related field.
	Trade test certification or equivalent qualifications in motorcycle and power product repair.
	Extensive knowledge and practical experience in motorcycle and power product repair.
	Proven experience as a trainer or educator in a technical field.
	Excellent communication and presentation skills.
	Ability to simplify complex concepts and make them accessible to learners.
	Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume and a Cover Letter detailing their qualifications and relevant experience to:&nbsp;hrsrc@honda-eu.com&nbsp;using &quot;Customer Service Technical Supervisor&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-30",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Honda Manufacturing Nigeria Limited"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",

      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }

Customer Service Technical Supervisor (Service Technician) Job at Honda Manufacturing Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Honda Manufacturing (Nig.) Limited ("HMN"), founded in 1979, is a leading participant in Nigeria's power products sector and a division of Honda Motor Co., Japan. HMN manufactures and distributes a wide range of motorbikes, portable generators, water pumps, and general-purpose engines from its cutting-edge production facility at KM 6 on the Ota-Idiroko Road in Ota, Ogun State.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Technical Supervisor (Service Technician)

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a knowledgeable and experienced Technician with high capability to deliver high-quality training programs for motorcycle and power product repairs.
	The ideal candidate should possess practical experience in these fields and the ability to effectively teach and mentor others.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and deliver training programs on motorcycle and power product repair.
	Create and maintain training materials, including manuals, presentations, and practical exercises.
	Assess the effectiveness of training programs and make improvements as needed.
	Provide hands-on training and demonstrations to individuals and groups.
	Stay up-to-date with industry trends and technological advancements to ensure training content is current.
	Support trainees with ongoing mentorship and guidance.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Engineering or a related field.
	Trade test certification or equivalent qualifications in motorcycle and power product repair.
	Extensive knowledge and practical experience in motorcycle and power product repair.
	Proven experience as a trainer or educator in a technical field.
	Excellent communication and presentation skills.
	Ability to simplify complex concepts and make them accessible to learners.
	Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume and a Cover Letter detailing their qualifications and relevant experience to: [email protected] using "Customer Service Technical Supervisor" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
